title: boehmeria lanceolata
intro: Boehmeria lanceolata, also known as Korean bugbane or lance-leaved nettle tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Boehmeria lanceolata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Boehmeria lanceolata can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
